title: lauro-cerasus microphylla
intro: Lauro-cerasus microphylla, also known as the Dwarf Cherry Laurel, is a compact and evergreen shrub native to China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and other infections. The health benefits of Lauro-cerasus microphylla include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds using a solvent.
